queries.question: Give me all the airport expansions and also give me all renovations that increased capacity to 1000 passengers per day.
queries.sql:
SELECT Development_Projects.ProjectName 
FROM Development_Projects
WHERE Development_Projects.ProjectName = "Airport Expansion" OR Development_Projects.ProjectName = "Renovation" AND Development_Projects.Increased_Capacity = "1000 Passengers per Day"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?projectname WHERE {
  ?development_projects a :Development_Projects .
  ?development_projects p:ProjectName ?projectname .
  ?development_projects p:ProjectName ?projectname_w .
  ?development_projects p:ProjectName ?projectname_w2 .
  ?development_projects p:Increased_Capacity ?increased_capacity_w .
  FILTER((STR(?projectname_w) = "Airport Expansion" || (STR(?projectname_w2) = "Renovation" && STR(?increased_capacity_w) = "1000 Passengers per Day")))
}

queries.question: Give me both airport expansions that increased capacity to 1000 passengers per day and renovations that increased capacity to the same number.
queries.sql:
SELECT Development_Projects.ProjectName 
FROM Development_Projects
WHERE (Development_Projects.ProjectName = "Airport Expansion" OR Development_Projects.ProjectName = "Renovation") AND Development_Projects.Increased_Capacity = "1000 Passengers per Day"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?projectname WHERE {
  ?development_projects a :Development_Projects .
  ?development_projects p:ProjectName ?projectname .
  ?development_projects p:ProjectName ?projectname_w .
  ?development_projects p:ProjectName ?projectname_w2 .
  ?development_projects p:Increased_Capacity ?increased_capacity_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?projectname_w) = "Airport Expansion" || STR(?projectname_w2) = "Renovation")) && STR(?increased_capacity_w) = "1000 Passengers per Day"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me all airport expansions and renovations that increased capacity to 1000 passengers per day.
